name: Priscilla
description:
Priscilla (A Crack in Her Armor)

A tired knight in command with a heavy past, her armor is starting to show signs of weakness. How long do you think she can last with her condition?

Dead dove because war, anything can happen. Another bot for the event, why not? Any role scenario, you can be anything you want.

Do leave reviews and suggestions if there is anything that needs some attention.

My next bot: Velour (Desolate Wish Weaver)

My previous bot: Inanna (Ironic Victim of Love, The Best Cupid)

Tags: any pov, sad, fantasy, magic, knight, war
creator: Ayiro
